choices.text: Correlation < 0.3 between strategies' monthly returns. >0.7 = essentially same strategy. Trend + mean-reversion + breakout often have low correlation; combine for smoother equity curve.

Move to Python (backtrader, vectorbt, NautilusTrader) or C++ for: sub-second execution, order book / Level 2 data, multi-symbol sub-second correlation, heavy historical backtest >100k bars. Pine perfect for solo retail with webhook automation up to that point.

questions.explanation: Pine fluent → Python/C++ when latency / depth / scale outgrow TradingView.
